tagline: Crafting scalable full-stack experiences — from clean UIs to powerful backends & AI-driven products.
description: Full Stack Developer building scalable web apps, cross-platform mobile solutions, and AI-powered products with modern technologies.

roles.detailed: Full-Stack Engineer · AI Engineer · Game Developer · Open Source Contributor

bio: Full Stack Developer currently pursuing B.Tech in Computer Science at VIT Bhopal (2022–2027). Experienced in building responsive UIs, RESTful APIs, cross-platform mobile apps, and AI-powered platforms using React.js, Next.js, Node.js, and Supabase. Passionate about solving real-world problems through clean code, scalable architecture, and modern web technologies.

bullets: Built responsive UIs using React.js with component-based architecture and REST API integration.
Developed RESTful APIs and server-side logic using Node.js and Express.js.
Managed relational and non-relational databases integrated with Express.js backend.
Deployed full stack React + Node.js applications into production environments.
experience.desc: Worked as a Full Stack Developer Intern under Mr. Adarsh Kewat (Module Lead). Built responsive React UIs, developed REST APIs with Node.js and Express.js, managed databases, and deployed full-stack applications to production.

bullets: Architected an optimized UI using Next.js and Tailwind CSS, reducing development time by 40% and improving Lighthouse accessibility score by 25%.
Designed posters, social media graphics, and event banners with Adobe Illustrator and Canva, boosting event engagement by 60%.
experience.desc: Served as both Frontend Developer and Design Lead. Built optimized Next.js UI and led visual design for club events, significantly improving accessibility scores and event engagement.

projects.title: ArtGenio
projects.subtitle: AI Prompt Marketplace & Creator Platform
projects.desc: Full-scale AI-powered marketplace for influencers and businesses. Features a subscription-based Creator Hub with 6 AI tools, Payment integration support for both international and domestic payments, scalable backend with MongoDB, and a complete admin dashboard for managing users, prompts, and analytics.

projects.title: EasyFolio
projects.subtitle: Multi-User Portfolio Platform
projects.desc: Full-stack multi-user portfolio platform enabling dynamic, database-driven portfolios with multiple themes. Role-based admin system, real-time content editing, PDF CV parsing, portfolio completion tracking.
